name: Hannes Duve
taglineDe: Senior Full-Stack & Mobile — Next.js, Expo, Cloud-Backends
taglineEn: Senior full-stack and mobile — Next.js, Expo, and cloud backends for web apps, mobile apps, and APIs; remote-friendly for teams in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, and beyond.
bioDe: Ich entwickle Web-Apps und React-Native-(Expo)-Produkte End-to-End: SaaS mit Next.js und Supabase, Freelancer-Tools mit Prisma und Stripe, AWS-Pipelines mit Lambda und Remotion sowie Mobile-Apps mit Firebase oder Amplify. Fokus: klare UX, testbare Architektur und wartbare Systeme — ideal für KMU, die Senior-Level brauchen und gleichzeitig flexibel mit einem Freelancer arbeiten wollen.
bioEn: I build web apps and React Native (Expo) products end to end: SaaS on Next.js and Supabase, freelancer tooling with Prisma and Stripe, AWS pipelines with Lambda and Remotion, and mobile apps backed by Firebase or Amplify. I focus on clear UX, testable architecture, and maintainable systems. That is a strong fit for small and mid-sized companies that need senior-level engineering while staying flexible with a freelance collaboration instead of a permanent hire.
